title: Accurate Terracotta Colors
description: Adjusts some of the terracotta colors to accurately be the color that they are named
body:
Adjusts a number of terracotta colors to more accurately portray the color that they are named

Changes the textures for these blocks:

* Black Terracotta
* Blue Terracotta
* Cyan Terracotta
* Gray Terracotta
* Light Blue Terracotta
* Light Gray Terracotta
* Pink Terracotta
* Purple Terracotta
* White Terracotta
